# Runners Hub — LLMs.txt

> Runners Hub is a free, independent platform for runners offering science-based calculators, expert gear reviews, training guides, and personalized recommendations.

## About
- Website: https://www.runners-hub.org
- Purpose: Help runners optimize performance through evidence-based tools and content
- Audience: Recreational and competitive runners of all levels
- Language: English

## Core Tools (Free, No Sign-Up)
- [Hydration Calculator](https://www.runners-hub.org/tools/hydration): Personalized fluid intake based on weight, duration, temperature
- [Calories Burned Calculator](https://www.runners-hub.org/tools/calories): Estimate calories burned per run based on body metrics and pace
- [BMI Calculator](https://www.runners-hub.org/tools/bmi): Body mass index analysis with runner-specific context
- [Protein Calculator](https://www.runners-hub.org/tools/protein): Daily protein needs for endurance athletes
- [Electrolyte Calculator](https://www.runners-hub.org/tools/electrolytes): Mineral loss estimation for training sessions
- [Shoe Finder](https://www.runners-hub.org/tools/shoes): 5-question quiz to match running shoes to your profile

## Key Content Sections
- [Training Guides](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides): 15+ expert articles on nutrition, form, recovery, gear
- [Product Comparisons](https://www.runners-hub.org/comparisons): Side-by-side supplement and gear comparisons
- [Product Hubs](https://www.runners-hub.org/hub): Curated gear and supplement collections by distance/sport
- [Runner Profile Quiz](https://www.runners-hub.org/quiz): Personalized archetype and training plan

## Popular Guides
- [Marathon Training Guide](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/marathon-training)
- [Running Nutrition](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/running-nutrition)
- [Injury Prevention](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/injury-prevention)
- [How to Choose Running Shoes](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/choosing-running-shoes)
- [Heart Rate Zone Training](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/running-heart-rate-zones)
- [Trail Running for Beginners](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/trail-running-beginners)
- [Supplements for Runners](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/supplements-for-runners)
- [Interval Training Guide](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/interval-training)
- [Running Form Technique](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/running-form)
- [Stretching for Runners](https://www.runners-hub.org/guides/stretching-for-runners)

## Frequently Asked Questions
- How much water should I drink while running? 400–800 ml/hour depending on conditions. Use the Hydration Calculator.
- How many calories does running burn? ~80–120 per mile depending on weight and pace. Use the Calories Calculator.
- How much protein do runners need? 1.2–1.7 g/kg/day for endurance athletes. Use the Protein Calculator.
- What are the best running shoes for beginners? Neutral, cushioned shoes with 8–10mm drop. Try the Shoe Finder.
- How do electrolytes affect running? They prevent cramps and maintain fluid balance. Use the Electrolyte Calculator.

## Editorial Standards
- All recommendations are evidence-based and independently researched
- No paid placements or sponsored reviews
- Affiliate links are clearly disclosed (Amazon Associates, Myprotein, Onnit)
- Content reviewed and updated regularly
